Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Height = 493 Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &PesPrpSts1 = nullvalue(&PesPrpSts1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPINS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &PesPrpSts2 = nullvalue(&PesPrpSts2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPINS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &PesPrpSts3 = nullvalue(&PesPrpSts3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPINS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) Form.Caption = 'Consulta de Cliente Propriedade' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PesTipPrp.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' PesPrpSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Editar = !'' &Select = !'' &AuxPesPrpNom = trim(str(PesPrpCod))+'-'+trim(PesPrpNom) Do Case Case PesTipPrp = TipoPropriedade.Proprietario PesTipPrp.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case PesTipPrp = TipoPropriedade.Proprietarioassociado PesTipPrp.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case PesTipPrp = TipoPropriedade.Arrendatario PesTipPrp.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case PesTipPrp = TipoPropriedade.Participante PesTipPrp.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise PesTipPrp.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case PesPrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Ativa PesPrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case PesPrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Inativa PesPrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case PesPrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Extinta PesPrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case PesPrpSts = Status_Propriedade.OutrasAreas PesPrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Otherwise PesPrpSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter &InOutEmpCod = EmpCod &InOutPesCod = PesCod &InOutPesPrpCod = PesPrpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Editar.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ClientePropriedade.PopUp(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod, PesPrpCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoFechar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ClientePropriedade.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), &InOutPesCod, nullvalue(PesPrpCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCadastrarPropriedade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Propriedades.Call(Trnmode.Insert, 0, 0, true, &PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesPrpIns1.Visible = False &PesPrpSts1.Visible = False &PesPrpCidNom1.Visible = False &PesPrpCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesPrpEnd1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPSTS' &PesPrpSts1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' &PesPrpCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' &PesPrpCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPEND' &PesPrpEnd1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesPrpIns2.Visible = False &PesPrpSts2.Visible = False &PesPrpCidNom2.Visible = False &PesPrpCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesPrpEnd2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPSTS' &PesPrpSts2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' &PesPrpCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' &PesPrpCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPEND' &PesPrpEnd2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesPrpIns3.Visible = False &PesPrpSts3.Visible = False &PesPrpCidNom3.Visible = False &PesPrpCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesPrpEnd3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPSTS' &PesPrpSts3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' &PesPrpCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' &PesPrpCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPEND' &PesPrpEnd3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPINS' &PesPrpIns1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPSTS' &PesPrpSts1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' &PesPrpCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' &PesPrpCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPEND' &PesPrpEnd1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPINS' AND not &PesPrpIns1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpIns1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPSTS' AND not &PesPrpSts1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpSts1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' AND not &PesPrpCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesPrpCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESPRPEND' AND not &PesPrpEnd1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpEnd1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPINS' AND not &PesPrpIns2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpIns2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPSTS' AND not &PesPrpSts2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpSts2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' AND not &PesPrpCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesPrpCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESPRPEND' AND not &PesPrpEnd2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpEnd2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPINS' AND not &PesPrpIns3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpIns3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPSTS' AND not &PesPrpSts3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpSts3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPCIDNOM' AND not &PesPrpCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesPrpCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESPRPEND' AND not &PesPrpEnd3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesPrpEnd3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub
